creator: proot@iaces.com
text:
There are a number of broken links in the porters handbook, which
	made figuring out how to submit a port challenging.

Fix: 

Sorry, I have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 	The file:
		http://www.FreeBSD.org/porters-handbook/x54.html
	does not exist at this server. YOu are coming from:
		http://www.FreeBSD.org/porters-handbook/quick-porting.html#AEN45

	There are a number of others, but I bet it's all the same problem.
